flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at St. John's University-New York rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($25.0k → $30.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at St. John's University-New York rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.0k → $53.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at St. John's University-New York fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).
